entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop being evaluated for salinity tolerance.

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: Environmental stress caused by high salt concentrations in soil.

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: Region where salinity is a significant agricultural problem.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country in South Asia affected by soil salinity.

entities.name: PAKISTAN
entities.description: Country in South Asia affected by soil salinity.

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a genotype to maintain productivity under saline conditions.

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The weight of seeds produced per plant, used to assess productivity under salinity.

entities.name: KABULI CHICKPEA
entities.description: A group of chickpea genotypes evaluated for salinity tolerance.

entities.name: DESI CHICKPEA
entities.description: A group of chickpea genotypes evaluated for salinity tolerance, found to have higher tolerance than kabuli.

entities.name: YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The inherent capacity of a genotype to produce yield under non-saline conditions.

entities.name: SHOOT DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the shoot after drying, measured at 50 days after sowing.

entities.name: VEGETATIVE STAGE
entities.description: The early growth phase of the plant before reproductive development.

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE STAGE
entities.description: The phase of plant growth involving flowering and pod development.

entities.name: FILLED PODS
entities.description: The number of pods containing seeds, identified as a key trait for salinity tolerance.

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the seeds produced.

entities.name: SHOOT NA+ CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of sodium ions in the plant shoot.

entities.name: SHOOT K+ CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of potassium ions in the plant shoot.

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating 263 chickpea accessions for salinity tolerance.
